description_long: This house features a modern, sprawling single-story layout with a combination of rectangular and hexagonal sections. The exterior includes a large wooden deck with a hot tub, lounge chairs, and a pergola, suggesting a focus on outdoor living. The main structure is connected to a distinctive hexagonal room with large, arched windows, providing ample natural light and a unique architectural flair. The house has multiple large windows and sliding glass doors, enhancing the open, airy feel. The roof is primarily flat, with some sections featuring glass or transparent coverings. Landscaping elements such as potted plants and a fenced perimeter add to the residential ambiance.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a wooden deck, and a unique hexagonal room with arched windows.
description_view_0: View 0 highlights the spacious wooden deck with a hot tub, lounge chairs, and pergola, as well as the main living areas and the attached hexagonal room.
description_view_1: View 1 shows the hexagonal room's prominent arched windows and the connection to the main house, with the deck and outdoor features less visible.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a clear look at the hexagonal room's stone-like exterior and the full length of the house, with the deck and pergola visible on the far side.
description_view_3: View 3 centers on the deck area, hot tub, and entryway, with the main house and hexagonal room in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door opening onto a wooden deck with steps, flanked by potted plants and a pergola.
